metadata.title: Meezan Women First | Women’s Banking | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: At Meezan Bank We Put Women’s Needs First! Car Ijarah is Meezan Bank’s car financing product and is Pakistan’s first Interest-free car financing. It is based on the Islamic financing mode of Ijarah (leasing). This product is ideal for individuals who want to get interest-free financing for acquiring locally manufactured /assembled vehicles.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Women First Account Women First Consumer Finance Women Entrepreneurs If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Meezan Women First Car Ijarah Car Ijarah is Meezan Bank’s car financing product and is Pakistan’s first Interest-free car financing. It is based on the Islamic financing mode of Ijarah (leasing). This product is ideal for individuals who want to get interest-free financing for acquiring locally manufactured /assembled vehicles. Car Ijarah works through a car rental agreement, under which the Bank purchases the car and rents it out to the customer for a period of 1 to 5 years, agreed at the time of the contract. Upon completion of the Ijarah period, the vehicle will be sold at a token amount or gifted to the customer. Key Features Financing period 1 to 3 years for all local manufactured vehicles above 1000 CC (engine capacity) period 1 to 5 local manufactured vehicles up to CC (engine capacity) Security deposit / advance rental: Minimum 30% SD for all vehicles Maximum financing of Rs. 3 Million Net Financing Amount No processing charges, 100% waiver Documentation and security charges to be paid at actual by applicant Meezan Bank will bear W.H.T (With Holding Tax) on purchase of vehicle Discounted Rental Payments, which starts after Vehicle Delivery Monthly rentals to be paid through Direct Debit Instructions (DDI) from PKR Meezan Bank Account No Charges & restriction on early termination of vehicle, 100% waiver Lowest Upfront Payment with Priority Processing Eligibility Criteria Salaried Individual Permanent employees : 3 months in current job with a minimum 2 years continuous employment history Contractual employees : 6 with a minimum 3 continuous employment history Net take home income : In excess of 2 times the monthly rental (inclusive of takaful) Spouse’s verifiable income : Clubbed to an extent of 50% In case of other loans, all monthly payments including proposed Ijarah rental combined not to exceed 40% of net / take home income Both data check & e-CIB should be clear and must not have current default / overdue the time of case approval Women Entrepreneur Minimum experience : 2 years continuous involvement in current business / industry Position : Proprietor, partner or director (In case of partner or director, percentage of sharing / holding will be applied) take home income In Case of small-scale women entrepreneur with cash income, income estimation will be done to access income However, up to 50% net/ take home income will be allowed for locally manufactures or assembled vehicles of to 1000 CC engine capacity of case approval Meezan Women First House Finance Easy Home is a completely interest (Riba) free solution to your home financing needs. Unlike a conventional house loan, Meezan Bank’s Easy Home works through the Diminishing Musharakah where you participate with Meezan Bank in joint ownership of your property. The nature of the contract is co-ownership and not a loan. This is because the transaction is not based on lending and borrowing of money but on joint ownership of a house. Meezan Bank, thus shares the cost of the house being purchased. Creating joint ownership and then gradually transferring ownership to the consumer instead of simply lending money is the major factor that makes Easy Home Shariah-compliant. With Easy Home ownership of your property, where the Bank will provide a certain amount of financing. You agree to a monthly payment to the Bank of which one component is rent for the home, and another for your equity share. In fact, the total monthly payment is reduced regularly as your share in the property grows. When you have made the full investment, which had been agreed upon, you become the sole owner with a clear title to the property. Key Features Discounted Rental Payments Early Unit Purchase / Balloon Payment 50% waiver of Partial Payment / Early termination In case of property appreciation additional Musharakah Units will be revalued at 3% higher than face value Life Takaful (Optional) with Accidental Death Coverage & Accidental/natural disability Property Takaful Coverage up to the outstanding finance amount will be obtained by bank at its own cost Easy Payment Plans with Affordable Installments and regular reducing monthly rental charges, 100% waiver Free Vouchers for home appliances (Limited Time Offer) Free Debit Card facility for First Year (Limited Time Offer) Products Easy Buyer Choose it and get ready to move in! in! Easy Buyer allows you to get financing for Residential House/Bungalow, Apartment / Flat, Town House. Easy selection of financing tenure from Minimum 3 years to Maximum 25 years & [For Businesswomen segment, maximum tenure will be 20 years]. Flexible financing from minimum PKR 0.5 Million to PKR 50 Million. Bank Investment Ratio (BIR) Up to 75% for Salaried / SEP / NRP. Up to 65% for Business persons. Easy Builder For that special home you want to build! build! Easy Builder get financing for Construction on applicant’s owned land, Construction of additional floor For purchase of land and construction thereon [50% of approved limit or land value whichever is lower for of land and 50% for construction] Business persons. Easy Renovate Make your home even better or just repair it! it! Easy Renovate get financing for Flooring / Tiling, Paint, Kitchen and washroom renovation years to Maximum 15 years. from minimum PKR 0.3 Million to PKR 10 (BIR) Up to 30% / SEP / NRP/ Business persons. Easy Replace Transfer your existing mortgage! existing mortgage! Easy Replacement allows you to transfer your existing house finance facility from any other bank to Meezan Bank[not before 1.5 years as per SBP regulations]. financing tenure from 3 years to 25 years[For to PKR 50 Million . for Business persons. Eligibility Criteria Citizenship Pakistani National Females Only Non-Resident Pakistanis Females (NRPs) as per policy Age limit Minimum age 25 years Maximum age at retirement 60 years (For salaried) age at retirement 65 years (For Businesswomen segment) Income Criteria Salaried : Minimum Gross Income of PKR. 40,000/- per month. Businesswomen / SEP Income of PKR. 75,000/- per month. NRP Income of PKR. 150,000/- per month. Employment/ Business Tenure Salaried : Permanent 2 years continuous work history in the same industry / field. SEP : Minimum 3 years current business / industry. NRP : Two years (minimum) regular experience in same industry. Minimum last one-year job with the existing employer & in the same country. Income Clubbing Criteria Immediate relative such as spouse/brother/father/son can become co-applicant. 50% income of the Co-applicant is clubbed for Debt Burden Ratio calculation. 100% of co-applicant’s income will be clubbed in case of spouse Debt Burden Ratio (DBR) Maximum up to 45% for Salaried individual Maximum up to 40% for Businesswomen / NRP/ SEP Security Mortgage of residential property. The Bank’s charge over property will be created through Token Registered along with equitable mortgage. Credit History Satisfactory payment history (ECIB) In case of NRP Credit Bureau report of resident country Meezan Women First Consumer Ease Consumer Durables & Apni Bike Meezan Consumer Ease is a Shariah-compliant financing facility for purchasing consumer durable goods such as air conditioners, refrigerators, generators etc. Under this facility, Meezan Bank will approve an overall limit for you after evaluating your application; you can then purchase durable goods, upto the amount of the facility approved for you, from the range of products offered by the Bank. Key Features Processing fee waiver 100% in & Apni Bike Processing fee waiver: 50% in Meezan Solar Residential Financing Women First Consumer Durable approved limit will be active for 3 years. Customer can utilize it in 3, 6, 12, 18 & 24 months for multiple drawdowns, keeping within the approved limit. Meezan Women First Apni Bike : Japanese Bikes for 2 Years & Chinese Bikes for 3 Years. Meezan Women First Solar will be Valid for residential users for financing up to 2 million on 1 to 5 years. Priority processing Minimum and Maximum Security Deposits : 5% to 50% in Consumer Durables, 15% to 50% in Apni Bike & Meezan Solar. Free Vouchers Time Offer) Products LEDs Washing Machines Smart Phones Appliances Air Conditioners Laptops Refrigerators Health & Fitness Consumer Durable Apni Bike Eligibility Criteria Under Durables Financing & Apni Bike Salaried Customers : The minimum income criteria are PKR 25,000/-, for trainee officer it is PKR 35,000/- whereas for SEB/SEP it is PKR 40,000/- Investment Income : The minimum gross monthly income from investment is PKR 15000 (100% lien marking on net financing amount is mandatory) How to Apply for Meezan Women First Visit your nearest Meezan Bank branch or call at 111-331-331 / 111-331-332 to initiate your application. Submit your CNIC, signed application form (provided below), along with copy of latest electricity bill. Open an account at Meezan Bank for availing financing in minimal time. Car Ijarah Easy Home Consumer Ease MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
